I am saying I wasn’t part of UNITEAM but yet I am hoping and looking forward that all the political noise end soon so we may go back and focus on the challenges and problems that the country is facing.

Hindi sa “ ako’y naghuhugas

I may be just one voice in the Senate but I will do my best to fight and push that the priority projects most specially the Foreign Assisted Projects be lodged in the Programmed Appropriations during the Bicam.

We cannot avoid anymore delays in the major infrastructure projects

I ran as an independent, wala akong utang na loob lalo sa Uniteam.  In fact I was booted out of the line up when they joined forces.

My debt of gratitude belongs to the Filipino people and no one else.

Happy to hear that PBBM mentioned of the need to amend the EPIRA Law which was hastily passed in 2001 and has not been effective in improving the country’s power industry.

About time EPIRA is amended.

Ayon sa UHC ang pondo para sa kalusugan, ay dapat na manatili para sa programa pang kalusugan.

Hindi ito maaring gamitin sa ibang bagay.

Bagaman naiintindihan natin na nangangailangan ng pondo ang ibang programa ng gobyerno, we believe that the fulfilment of the goals and objectives of the UHC Law should be accorded priority. 

Ang pondo para sa kalusugan ay dapat gamitin para sa kalusugan.
As the author and sponsor of the Universal Health Care Law, I am concerned about the transfer and utilization of the reserve funds from Philhealth to the unprogrammed fund of the national government.

I congratulate  Sen. Chiz Escudero and the new majority. 

Sen. Escudero is a capable, experienced and a very intelligent public servant.

While I am sad that my friend, Sen. Zubiri lost the Senate Presidency despite his sterling performance & principles, we take comfort and pride in the fact that we did have a peaceful and orderly transfer of leadership to Sen. Escudero.
